title: HTTP/2 Server Push & Priorities
description: Evaluate the practical limitations and challenges that led to the deprecation of HTTP/2 Server Push. Explain how HTTP 103 Early Hints provides a superior and more resilient preloading strategy. Compare the use cases and performance implications of HTTP/2 priorities with 103 Early Hints.
objectives: Evaluate the practical limitations and challenges that led to the deprecation of HTTP/2 Server Push.
Explain how HTTP 103 Early Hints provides a superior and more resilient preloading strategy.
Compare the use cases and performance implications of HTTP/2 priorities with 103 Early Hints.
